fields.balance_or_borrowing_amount: Using the following notes as a guideline, show the requirements of compensating balances and short-term borrowing agreements. Footnote

fields.arrangement_description: disclosure is required even the arrangement is not reduced to writing.

fields.balance_or_borrowing_amount: Disclose compensating balances not legally restricted, lines of credit used and unused, average interest rate of short-term borrowings that are

fields.arrangement_description: outstanding at balance sheet date, maximum amount of outstanding borrowings during the period and the weighted average rate of those borrowings.

fields.balance_or_borrowing_amount: Time deposits and certificates of deposit constituting compensating balances not legally restricted should be disclosed.
Compensating balance arrangements need only be disclosed for the latest fiscal year.
Compensating balances included in Account 703, Special Deposits, and in Account 717, Other Funds, should also be separately disclosed below.
Compensating balance arrangements are sufficiently material to require disclosure in footnotes when the aggregate of written and oral

fields.arrangement_description: agreement balances amount to 15% or more of liquid assets (current cash balances, restricted and unrestricted, plus marketable securities).

fields.balance_or_borrowing_amount: When a carrier is not in compliance with a compensating balance requirement, that fact should be disclosed, along with stated and possible

fields.arrangement_description: sanctions, whenever such possible sanctions may be immediate (not vague or unpredictable) and material.

content.text: In addition to separating capital expenses and operating expenses incurred by the railroad for PTC, the respondent entity should include by footnote disclosure here the value of funds received from government transfers to include grants, subsidies, and other contributions or reimbursements that the respondent entity used to purchase or create PTC assets or to offset PTC costs. These amounts represent non-railroad monies that the respondent entity used for PTC and would provide for full disclosure of PTC costs on an annual basis. This disclosure would identify the nature and location of the project by FRA identification, if applicable.
Line No. Entity Receiving Funds Name of Program Providing Funding Location(s) of the Project Funded Amount of Funding Received Line No.
BNSF received the following amounts of PTC Grant Funding in years prior to 2020
Meteorcomm LLC, of which BNSF has 25% ownership and accounts for as an equity method investment, received PTC grant funding in prior years. BNSF's portion is as follows:
PTC Supplement to Railroad Annual Report R-1
